changelog: PERF: Baseline profile baked into the APK. Fire Stick now AOT-compiles the hot Compose paths (Home, Live TV, player startup, license gate, image loading) at install time instead of interpreting them on first launch — expect another 20-35% faster cold start on top of v1.44.96's gains.
PERF: profileinstaller runtime added so library-shipped profiles (Compose, Media3, Coil) activate automatically — these alone speed up image decoding and player initialization.
APK still 13 MB — the profile itself only costs ~14 KB.
